info.title: Blogware RESTful API
info.description:
RESTful API for Blogware content management system.

This API provides programmatic access to blog posts, categories, comments, and archives.
It follows OpenAPI 3.0 specification and supports both public and authenticated operations.

## Authentication

The API supports two authentication methods:
- **API Key**: Pass your API key in the `X-API-Key` header
- **Bearer Token**: Pass a bearer token in the `Authorization` header

Example:
```
X-API-Key: your-api-key-here
```
or
```
Authorization: Bearer your-token-here
```

## Rate Limiting

API requests are rate limited to ensure fair usage and prevent abuse:

| Endpoint Type | Limit | Window |
|--------------|-------|--------|
| **Read (GET)** | 60 requests | 60 seconds |
| **Write (POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH)** | 20 requests | 60 seconds |

Rate limits are tracked per client using API key, Bearer token, or IP address.

The following headers are included in all responses:
- `X-RateLimit-Limit`: Maximum requests allowed per window
- `X-RateLimit-Remaining`: Remaining requests in current window
- `X-RateLimit-Reset`: Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets
- `Retry-After`: Seconds to wait before retrying (only on 429 responses)

Exceeding the rate limit returns `429 Too Many Requests`.

## HATEOAS (Hypermedia as the Engine of Application State)

All API responses include HATEOAS links following [RFC 5988 (Web Linking)](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988).
Each response contains a `_links` object with discoverable navigation:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 200,
  "data": { ... },
  "_links": {
    "self": { "href": "...", "rel": "self", "type": "GET" },
    "collection": { "href": "...", "rel": "collection", "type": "GET" }
  }
}
```

Common link relations: `self`, `collection`, `first`, `prev`, `next`, `last`, `canonical`, `comments`, `post`, `posts`, `year`, `search`, `service-desc`.

## Caching and Conditional Requests

GET responses are cacheable with ETag and Last-Modified headers:
- **ETag**: Entity tag for cache validation
- **Last-Modified**: Timestamp of last resource modification
- **If-None-Match**: Client sends cached ETag to check for changes
- **If-Modified-Since**: Client sends cached timestamp
- **304 Not Modified**: Response when resource hasn't changed

Cache-Control headers vary by HTTP method:
- **GET**: `public, max-age=300` (cacheable for 5 minutes)
- **POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH**: `no-store` (never cache)
- **4xx errors**: `no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate`

## Content Negotiation

The API supports `Accept` header validation. Requests with unsupported media types receive `406 Not Acceptable`. Currently only `application/json` is supported.

## Response Format

All responses are returned in JSON format with the following structure:

### Success Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 200,
  "message": "Operation description",
  "data": { ... }
}
```

### Paginated Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 200,
  "data": [...],
  "pagination": {
    "current_page": 1,
    "per_page": 10,
    "total_items": 50,
    "total_pages": 5,
    "has_next_page": true,
    "has_previous_page": false
  }
}
```

### Error Response
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "status": 400,
  "error": {
    "code": "BAD_REQUEST",
    "message": "Error description"
  }
}
```

## Filtering and Sorting

Query parameters for filtering and sorting:
- `page`: Page number (default: 1)
- `per_page`: Items per page (default: 10, max: 100)
- `sort_by`: Field to sort by
- `sort_order`: Sort direction (ASC or DESC)

get.description: Returns API metadata, available endpoints, and usage information

Retrieves a paginated list of published blog posts.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

post.description:
Creates a new blog post.
Requires authentication with administrator, editor, or author permissions.

get.description:
Retrieves a single blog post by its ID.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

put.description:
Updates an existing blog post.
Requires authentication with administrator or editor permissions.

delete.description:
Deletes a blog post.
Requires authentication with administrator permissions.

patch.description:
Partially updates an existing blog post. Only send the fields you want to change.
Requires authentication with administrator or editor permissions.

get.description:
Retrieves approved comments for a specific blog post.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

post.description:
Verifies the password for a password-protected post without returning content.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

Verifies password and returns decrypted content for a password-protected post.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.
Rate limited to prevent brute force attacks.

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of all categories/topics.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

post.description:
Creates a new category/topic.
Requires authentication with administrator or editor permissions.

get.description:
Retrieves a single category/topic by its ID.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

put.description:
Updates an existing category/topic.
Requires authentication with administrator or editor permissions.

delete.description:
Deletes a category/topic.
Requires authentication with administrator permissions.

patch.description:
Partially updates an existing category/topic. Only send the fields you want to change.
Requires authentication with administrator or editor permissions.

get.description:
Retrieves posts belonging to a specific category.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

Retrieves a paginated list of approved comments.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

post.description:
Creates a new comment on a blog post.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.
Comments are submitted with 'pending' status for moderation.

get.description:
Retrieves a single comment by its ID.
This endpoint is public for approved comments.

put.description:
Updates an existing comment.
Requires authentication with administrator or editor permissions.

delete.description:
Deletes a comment.
Requires authentication with administrator or editor permissions.

patch.description:
Partially updates an existing comment. Only send the fields you want to change.
Requires authentication with administrator or editor permissions.

get.description:
Returns a list of years and months that have published posts.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

get.summary: Get posts from a specific year
get.description:
Retrieves posts published in a specific year.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

get.summary: Get posts from a specific month
get.description:
Retrieves posts published in a specific month and year.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

Searches posts and pages for the given keyword.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

Searches only posts for the given keyword.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

Searches only pages for the given keyword.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

Retrieves the current user's GDPR consent status.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

post.description:
Submits GDPR consent preferences.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

get.description:
Retrieves a list of all available languages.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

post.description:
Creates a new language for internationalization.
Requires authentication with administrator permissions.

get.description:
Retrieves only active languages.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

Retrieves a single language by its code.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

put.description:
Updates an existing language.
Requires authentication with administrator permissions.

delete.description:
Deletes a language.
Requires authentication with administrator permissions.

get.description:
Retrieves the default language.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

put.description:
Sets a language as the default.
Requires authentication with administrator permissions.

get.description:
Retrieves translations for a specific language.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

post.description:
Creates a new translation entry.
Requires authentication with administrator permissions.

get.description:
Retrieves a single translation by key.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

put.description:
Updates an existing translation by ID.
Requires authentication with administrator permissions.

delete.description:
Deletes a translation by ID.
Requires authentication with administrator permissions.

get.description:
Exports translations for a language as JSON.
This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

post.description:
Imports translations from JSON.
Requires authentication with administrator permissions.

Regenerates the translation cache for a language.
Requires authentication with administrator permissions.

Uploads an image file for use in posts.
Requires admin authentication.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key authentication. Pass your API key in the X-API-Key header.

BearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Pass your bearer token in the Authorization header.

href.description: The URL of the linked resource

type.description: The HTTP method or MIME type

templated.description: Whether the URL is a URI template

Links.description: HATEOAS links for discoverable API navigation

NotFound.description: Not Found - Resource does not exist

TooManyRequests.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

NotAcceptable.description: Not Acceptable - Requested media type not supported

NotModified.description: Not Modified - Resource has not changed (use cached version)
